name: Exponential Function
description: The natural exponential function. Always positive, strictly increasing, and concave up.

name: Natural Logarithm
description: The inverse of e^x. Defined only for positive x with a vertical asymptote at x = 0.

name: Cosine Function
description: Even periodic function with period 2π. The companion to sine in trigonometry and waves.

name: Tangent Function
description: Odd periodic function with period π and vertical asymptotes where cos(x) = 0.

name: Cotangent Function
description: Reciprocal of tangent with period π and vertical asymptotes where sin(x) = 0.

name: Secant Function
description: Reciprocal of cosine with period 2π and U-shaped branches between asymptotes.

name: Cosecant Function
description: Reciprocal of sine with period 2π and vertical asymptotes at multiples of π.

name: Arcsine Function
description: Inverse of sine restricted to [-π/2, π/2]. Endpoint critical points at x = ±1.

name: Arctangent Function
description: Inverse of tangent with horizontal asymptotes at y = ±π/2 and an inflection at the origin.

name: Arcsecant Function
description: Inverse of secant with two branches and a vertical asymptote at x = 0 in the derivative.
